results.name: sword half-sheathed
results.description: A sword in the process of being drawn or sheathed, with a portion of the blade outside the scabbard and the rest inside.

results.name: sword of the realms
results.description: A tyrite sword forged on Kaldheim.

results.name: sword of x and y
results.description: Originally a slow cycle of swords that give an protection from an enemy coloured pairing and additional bonuses based on those colors, now an enduring archetype of magic.

results.name: sylex
results.description: A form of superweapon used by Urza to end the Brothers war, and recreated by Saheeli during the Phyrexian Invasion

results.name: symbiote
results.description:
Symbiotes as they appear in Magic's Multiverse, debuting in Through the Omenpaths. 
For Symbiotes in the Marvel Universe, see [symbiote (marvel)](symbiote-marvel).

results.name: symbiote (marvel)
results.description: Symbiotes as they appear in the Marvel franchise. For Magic's own take on the concept, see [symbiote](symbiote).

results.name: symbiote spider-man
results.description: When Peter Parker bonded with the symbiote that would later become Venom, he donned a black suit and fought crime as a darker, more violent version of Spider-Man.

results.name: symmetrical
results.description: Cards that affect the whole battlefield/all players in symmetrical, equal manner.

results.name: symmetry
results.description: Cards with symmetrical composition. They do not need to be perfectly mirrored, just intentionally invoking symmetry.

results.name: synergy-1/1
results.description: Cards that synergize with creatures that are specifically 1/1.

results.name: synergy-color-every
results.description: Cards that want all five colors to be present. See also [synergy-color-each](synergy-color-each) for effects that still scale up based on the number of colors, but don't necessarily need you to have all five.

results.name: synergy-counterspell
results.description: Cards that make countering spells and abilities better.
